response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to TypeScript, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and agentic workflows via MCP, with notable open-source contributions and technical leadership — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct GenAI customer-facing consulting, which are core to the role.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Strong track record in cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) and scalable data systems
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, open-source projects, and mentoring across teams
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production AI/GenAI systems — most roles are general software engineering
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/optimization frameworks
Limited documentation of direct enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or consulting engagements
